response.step_by_step_log:
1. Watched the video and identified two distinct song segments.
2. Segment 1 (00:00 - 01:45): Identified song "許婚っきゅん" via top-left on-screen text. Performed by Nakiri Ayame and Usada Pekora. Searched '"許婚っきゅん" Japanese and English lyrics' and found the song is originally by 'ano'.
3. Segment 2 (01:45 - 05:01): Identified song "回レ！雪月花" via on-screen text at 02:16. Performed by Nakiri Ayame, Shirakami Fubuki, and Ookami Mio. Searched '"回レ！雪月花" Japanese and English lyrics' and identified the original artists as 'Hitomi Harada, Ai Kayano, Yui Ogura (as 歌組雪月花)'.
4. Extracted lyrics for both songs, ensuring Japanese and English translation were included.
5. Constructed the JSON object.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by Hololive members (Nakiri Ayame, Usada Pekora, Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio) as part of a 3D performance event celebrating Nakiri Ayame's 7th anniversary.

scenes.description: Nakiri Ayame and Usada Pekora perform the song 'Iinazukkyun' on a Japanese-themed stage. The song title appears in the top-left corner at the beginning of the scene.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
い・い・許婚っきゅん
I love you なのだ
四六時中愛をちょうだい
さて?
い・い・一か八ッキュン
I・哀・逢・愛
罠ろっきゅー
1/2がもうたまんない.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Everyone around seems so carefree,
But still, that girl I’m interested in.
...
1/2 is already unbearable.

scenes.description: Nakiri Ayame, Shirakami Fubuki, and Ookami Mio perform the song 'Maware! Setsugetsuka'. The song title appears on-screen at 02:16.
scenes.original_artist: Hitomi Harada, Ai Kayano, Yui Ogura (as 歌組雪月花)
scenes.performer_in_video: Nakiri Ayame, Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
はぁ〜回レ回レ回レ回レ回レ回レ回レ回レ回レ!
華麗に花弁散らすように
回レ回レ回レ回レ回レ回レ回レ回レ回レ!
髪も振り乱して
一昨日、昨日、 今日と、明日と、明後日と
この宴は続く
踊レ、歌エ、一心不乱に回レ!
今宵は雪月花.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Ah~ Spin, spin, spin, spin, spin,
Spin, spin, spin, spin, spin,
Like scattering petals beautifully,
Spin, spin, spin, spin, spin,
Spin, spin, spin, spin, spin,
Disheveling my hair too.
Day before yesterday, yesterday, today, tomorrow, and the day after tomorrow,
This banquet continues.
Dance, sing, spin with all your might!
Tonight is Setsugetsuka.
